queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of credit default probability associated with borrowers lacking a formal checking account.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: The mitigating impact of consumer loan purposes for purchasing radio or television equipment on credit risk drivers and repayment reliability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical evaluation of the relationship between negative checking account balances and reduced credit default probability in consumer lending.
